str:Code.com:Name: Wage rate
str:Code.com:Description: A measure of the monetary compensation for labor services, typically expressed in terms of a fixed amount per hour, day, month, or other unit of time.

str:Code.com:Name: Unemployment rate
str:Code.com:Description: The percentage of the labor force that is unemployed and actively seeking employment. It is calculated as the number of unemployed persons divided by the total labor force.

str:Code.com:Name: Employed persons
str:Code.com:Description: Persons above the age of 15 who were in paid employment or self-employment during a specified reference period.

str:Code.com:Name: Labor force
str:Code.com:Description: The sum of employed and unemployed persons in an economy, actively participating in the labor market.

str:Code.com:Name: Unemployed persons
str:Code.com:Description: Persons of working age who are without work, are currently available for work, and are actively seeking employment.
